title: carduus nutans subsp. micropterus
intro: Carduus nutans subsp. micropterus, also known as the small-flowered plumeless thistle, is a subspecies of the Carduus nutans plant, a thistle native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Carduus nutans subsp. micropterus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although it is essential to note that its use should be under the guidance of a medical professional due to potential side effects.
